defs: In a heavy manner; with great weight; as, to bear heavily on a thing; to be heavily loaded.
quotes: Heavily interested in those schemes of emigration.

defs: As if burdened with a great weight; slowly and laboriously; with difficulty; hence, in a slow, difficult, or suffering manner; sorrowfully.
quotes: And took off their chariot wheels, that they drave them heavily.
Why looks your grace so heavily to-day?

defs: Greatly; intensely; as, heavily involved in a plot; heavily invested in real estate.
In large quantity; as, it rained heavily.
